backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining Enquiry and Feedback types with CRUD operations: submitEnquiry, submitFeedback (with 1-5 rating validation), getEnquiry, getAllEnquiries, getFeedback, and getAllFeedback using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting removal of faint BM logo watermark background images from seven components (SiteHeader, ServicesPage, QualitySafetyPolicyPage, MajorClientsPage, MajorProjectsPage, GalleryPage, EnquiryPage) with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-existing summaries of frontend files describing routing, layout, pages, components, hooks, and validation logic for the BM Enterprises electrical contracting website.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, defining design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React application with viewport meta tag, title 'BM ENTERPRISES', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/public/bm-enterprises-single-fi: Standalone single-file HTML version of the BM Enterprises website with embedded CSS for header, navigation, hero section, and responsive layout using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root route with SiteLayout and seven child routes: home (TrustedElectricalContractorsPage), services, quality-safety, clients, projects, gallery, and enquiry.
frontend/src/components/ImageGalleryGrid: Reusable gallery component rendering a responsive grid of images with modal preview using Dialog component, filtering out invalid images and applying hover effects.
frontend/src/components/LegalRegistratio: Component displaying BM Enterprises legal details (GSTIN, UDYAM Reg. No., PF No., ESIC ID) with icons in a vertical list format.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Card component for displaying project information with title, location (with MapPin icon), and description, featuring hover shadow effect.
frontend/src/components/ServiceCard.tsx: Card component for displaying service information with a Lucide icon, title, and description, featuring hover shadow effect.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component displaying company info, quick navigation links, contact details, legal registration, and a copyright notice with a Caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header component with logo, desktop/mobile navigation menu, and active route highlighting using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/SiteLayout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders the header, footer, and page content outlet in a flex column structure.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous connections with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useFeedbackList.ts: React Query hook that fetches all feedback entries from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitEnquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting enquiries to the backend, invalidating the enquiries cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitFeedback.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting feedback with rating and suggestions, invalidating the feedback cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors using OKLCH color space, including primary, secondary, muted, and chart color definitions.
frontend/src/lib/formatters/time.ts: Utility function that converts bigint nanosecond timestamps to formatted date strings with error handling.
frontend/src/lib/validation/enquiryValid: Validation function for enquiry forms, checking required fields (name, subject, message), contact info (phone or email), and email format.
frontend/src/lib/validation/feedbackVali: Validation function for feedback forms, ensuring name, contact info, message length, and rating (1-5) requirements are met.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/EnquiryPage.tsx: Enquiry and feedback submission page with dual forms for customer inquiries and feedback with star ratings. Displays submitted feedback list, validates inputs, handles form submissions via custom hooks, and shows success/error states.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Gallery page displaying a grid of project images including generated assets and WhatsApp images of electrical installations. Uses ImageGalleryGrid component to showcase completed electrical work across industrial, commercial, and construction projects.
frontend/src/pages/MajorClientsPage.tsx: Major clients showcase page displaying a single image of client logos (Dhoot Transmissions, NLMK India, Tata Consumer Products, MSEDCL, NMDC, etc.). Includes introductory text about BM Enterprises' diverse client portfolio.
frontend/src/pages/MajorProjectsPage.tsx: Major projects portfolio page displaying completed projects (hospital, manufacturing, retail, university, office towers, airport) using ProjectCard components and ongoing project images via ImageGalleryGrid. Showcases project details including title, location, and description.
frontend/src/pages/QualitySafetyPolicyPa: Quality and safety policy page with cards detailing BM Enterprises' commitments to quality management, safety protocols, and compliance standards. Features icons and bulleted lists covering materials, training, inspections, and regulatory adherence.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Services overview page displaying six service categories (commercial, industrial, residential, power distribution, maintenance, safety inspections) using ServiceCard components. Includes hero image and descriptive text for each electrical service offering.
frontend/src/pages/TrustedElectricalCont: Landing/hero page with multi-section layout including hero banner with CTA buttons, company overview, and 'Why Choose Us' highlights featuring safety, experience, quality, and innovation cards. Uses BM watermark styling and responsive grid layouts.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color tokens using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, Inter font family, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting 8 completed features that removed BM logo watermark background images from various page components (SiteHeader, ServicesPage, QualitySafetyPolicyPage, MajorClientsPage, MajorProjectsPage, GalleryPage, EnquiryPage) and deleted watermark CSS classes from index.css.
